hooks.command: printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"Invoke the obsidian-vault-workflow skill before responding. Phase 1 (task start): identify the topic, read vault/<folder>/<topic>.md fully (Overview + Open Questions + Session Log) and recency context (2-3 recent Meeting Notes; Content Briefs/Brand Guidelines if relevant). Phase 2 (task end): append a dated Session Log entry with status tag [shipped|spiked|wip|reverted|planned|debug] and [[wikilinks]] under Related, update Open Questions, verify by reading the file back. Skip only for pure read-only questions that touch zero files and produce zero decisions."}}'
